name: Crazy Merge
author: Poki
description: Crazy Merge is a wacky merge game where you cook for hungry monsters using hilarious Brainrot ingredients! Start with cute Burbaloni Luliloli, merge two identical items to upgrade them, and keep combining ingredients and tools to unlock all the crazy recipes. As you progress, new items and surprises appear in your monster-filled kitchen. Ready to merge, cook, and collect them all? How to play Crazy Merge? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to merge items. Who created Crazy Merge? Crazy Merge is created by Basurita Games. Play their other games on Poki: Moley Miner ! How can I play Crazy Merge for free? You can play Crazy Merge for free on Poki. Can I play Crazy Merge on mobile devices and desktop? Crazy Merge can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
